extension.summary: No scrolling. No deciding. Just watching.
extension.description: Tired of scrolling through your library wondering what to watch? EasyTV handles it. It tracks your shows and always knows your next episode. When you're ready for something new, it'll suggest a show you haven't started. Throw in some movies if you want. Just sit down, press play, and enjoy. Built for Kodi 21+.
extension.news: v1.5.8 (2026-07-04) - Fixed: starting an in-progress episode from the Browse list now resumes where you left off instead of playing from the beginning - Fixed: a premiere you have already started watching now stays in the random playlist when the premiere filter is set to Skip or Only - Improved the "you missed an earlier episode" prompt so it no longer lingers onto an unrelated video after a failed playback
